response.overview: In a village at the foot of Mount Budo, Diana begins behaving violently after disappearing into the forest, forcing her husband Anas to kill her. Believing her spirit is trapped in the world of jinn, Anas seeks a way to bring her back, while Babording, a religious leader, tries to stop him, leading to a clash between faith, mysticism, and love. Meanwhile, Lin, a university student, becomes lost in the forest during a research trip and is drawn into the world of djinn — a realm that feeds on human souls. In the end, everyone must pay a price in blood, memory, or life to stop the evil from Mount Budo.
response.title: ของแขก 2
